effect_entries.effect: Inflige des dégâts réguliers.  Supprime leech seed du lanceur, libère le lanceur de bind, clamp, fire spin, magma storm, sand tomb, whirlpool, et wrap, et balaye spikes, stealth rock, et toxic spikes du côté du terrain du lanceur.  Si cette capacité manque sa cible ou a aucun effet, son effet ne s'active pas.
effect_entries.short_effect: Libère le lanceur des capacités ligotantes, supprime Vampigraine, et retire les Picots.

effect_entries.effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Removes leech seed from the user, frees the user from bind, clamp, fire spin, magma storm, sand tomb, whirlpool, and wrap, and clears spikes, stealth rock, and toxic spikes from the user’s side of the field.  If this move misses or has no effect, its effect doesn’t activate.
effect_entries.short_effect: Frees the user from binding moves, removes Leech Seed, and blows away Spikes.
